why: Protocol 775 Login clientbound minecraft:cookie_request must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and key-only body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet-support evidence only, not cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test cannot compile because Packet::LoginCookieRequest does not exist, and the current Protocol 775 Login clientbound table has no mapping for official packet id 0x05.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
